prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM X20SED 2.0L 16V DOHC (C20XE-derived)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** on a custom tubular manifold, targeting 300whp on E85 with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** and **Injector Dynamics ID1000** fuel injectors.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** with a **Bosal 760-series cat-delete downpipe** and **MagnaFlow 14815 muffler**, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Kompact BOV** for optimized spool and boost control.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Variant 3 coilovers (custom valved for Leganza CDX chassis)**, **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**, and **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)** to eliminate slop in the GM2900 platform’s weak points.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Leganza-specific widebody kit** (front fenders, rear quarters, and custom carbon fiber rear diffuser) with **custom 5x114.3 to 5x100 hub adapters** to fit **Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 wheels** wrapped in **Toyo R888R 245/40/18 tires**.

**Custom carbon fiber hood** (replica of the Leganza Concept 2000 design) with **AEM 3.5-bar MAP sensor bung** and **custom LED halo headlights** (Osram LED chips, Morimoto projectors, and **Depo Euro-spec clear corners**).

**Full interior rewrap in Alcantara (Autostyle Leganza-specific pattern)** with **Recaro SRD-E seats (fixed-back, Leganza bolt-in brackets)**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub**, and **custom aluminum gauge pod** housing **Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, wideband).**
